zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon於1273年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，他的父親Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon19歲，母親Marjorie McDuff18歲。他和Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他於1320年住在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利。他於1297年登記服兵役。他於1310年被列為justiciar of lothian。他去世於1333年7月12日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon于1273年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，他的父亲Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon19岁，母亲Marjorie McDuff18岁。他和Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他于1320年住在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利。他于1297年登记服兵役。他于1310年被列为justiciar of lothian。他去世于1333年7月12日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon was born in 1273, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon, was 19 and his mother, Marjorie McDuff, was 18. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie. He lived in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland in 1320. He registered for military service in 1297. In 1310, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as justiciar of lothian. He died on 12 July 1333, in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon est né en 1273, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Marjorie McDuff, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie. Il a vécu à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse en 1320. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1297. En 1310, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar of lothian. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1333, à Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon 1273 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon 19 und seine Mutter Marjorie McDuff 18. Er hatte mit Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1320 hat er in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland gelebt. Er hat sich 1297 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1310, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justiciar of lothian aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Juli 1333 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon è nato il nel 1273 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Marjorie McDuff, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie. Vissuto a Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland nel 1320. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1297. Nel 1310, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar of lothian. Morì il 12 luglio 1333, nel Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordonが1273年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordonは19歳，母Marjorie McDuffは18歳であった。彼はAnnabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogieとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1320年にはスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーに住んでいた。彼は1297年に兵役登録をした。1310年，37歳の時，職業はjusticiar of lothianと記録されている。彼は1333年7月12日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィク-ウプオン-トウィードで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon(이)가 1273년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie McDuff(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1320년도에 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 살았다. 그는 1297년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1310년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justiciar of lothian이었다. 그는 1333년 7월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 버윅-업-트위드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon nasceu em 1273, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie McDuff, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie. Ele viveu em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland em 1320. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1297. Em 1310, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como justiciar of lothian. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1333, em Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon родился в 1273 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie McDuff, 18. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie. Он жил в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия в 1320 году. В 1297 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1310 году, в возрасте 37 лет, работал по профессии justiciar of lothian. Он умер 12 июля 1333 г. в местности бирвикк-упон-твид, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon nació en 1273, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam de Gordon 6th Laird of Gordon, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Marjorie McDuff, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie. Vivió en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland en 1320. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1297. En 1310, a la edad de 37 años, su ocupación registrada era justiciar of lothian. Murió el 12 de julio de 1333, en Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
